classification: inventory authority for v21 package breadth
why_used: Provides a direct written inventory of the v21 canonical closure package and confirms broad-system scope such as memory, authoring, UI, and reference scaffold coverage.
outcome: Preserved as evidence for v21 breadth and used as a cross-check against later compressed MVP summaries.

why_used: Useful for drift detection, omission checking, and understanding what the lean packaging intentionally removed or compressed.
outcome: Used as a comparison artifact only, not as the final canonical base.

why_used: Strongest repo-centered source for code reality, GoC A-F experience closures, publish/runtime continuity, UI docs, validation corpus, and service boundaries.
outcome: Preserved as the primary implementation and proof anchor for this pass.

why_used: Carries the earlier preservation-first audit pass and the first subject-based canonical MVP family for this source set.
outcome: Preserved as prior consolidation evidence and anti-loss comparator.

why_used: Already preserved the extended canonical document family, including governed package lifecycle and operational governance seams.
outcome: Chosen as the working base for the final consolidation pass.

why_used: Useful for checking that prior collection work did not recover any still-valid material beyond the extended package, and for identifying where collection scope notes should remain audit context rather than canonical MVP truth.
outcome: Used as a cross-check and preserved as audit context, but not taken as the final base because this pass performs its own runtime-proof judgment.

why_used: Used to verify that the AI-stack, research, and MCP-support surfaces were not merely mentioned in docs but also represented in code and tests.
outcome: Used as a related implementation cross-check, not as a separate canonical-document driver.

artifact: embedded mvp/docs family inside supplied archives
why_used: Carries the v21-style broad WoS target, memory/world-model depth, writers-room scope, multi-session continuity, and runtime-maturity framing.
outcome: Direct carry-forward source for enduring-target restoration.

why_used: Strongest already-normalized subject-based canonical MVP family before this pass.
Carries GoC A-F closure reports, shell-loop proof, backend transitional retirement posture, and activation-path evidence.

artifact: docs/user, docs/admin, docs/start-here, roadmap docs, and related UX/governance docs
why_used: Preserve player-shell clarity, publish/runtime continuity, GoC player-facing expectations, room/object pressure reading, operator journeys, and settings/control-plane governance.
outcome: Strengthened and integrated into the canonical MVP family.

why_used: Available for direct rerun in this container and therefore valuable for fresh reality checking.
outcome: Rerun directly in this pass and recorded under final-consolidation raw outputs.

why_used: High-value route-level proof for session and player-shell seams.
outcome: Kept explicit as blocked proof surfaces because Flask is unavailable in this container.
